name: tesla
description: Combined CLI for multiple API services

env_var_specs.name: TESLA_AUTH_TOKEN
env_var_specs.description: Tesla iOS-app OAuth bearer token (8-hour TTL). Mint via tesla auth login.

charging.description: Supercharger queue position and charging status

get_queue.description: Current Supercharger queue position (which stall, ETA)

energy_sites.description: Powerwall and solar energy site config

get_rate_tariffs.description: Utility rate plans for Powerwall scheduling

create_logs.description: Forward client-side log events (mostly internal use)

products.description: Vehicles, Powerwalls, and solar products owned by the user

get_products.description: List vehicles, Powerwalls, and solar products owned

create_actuate_trunk.description: Open/close trunk or frunk; which_trunk = front | rear

create_add_charge_schedule.description: Add a charging schedule (location + time window)

body.name: precondition_time
body.description: Minutes from midnight to be ready

create_charge_max_range.description: Set charge limit to Max Range (100%)

create_seat_heater_request.description: Set seat heater level (0-3) at a seat position (0=driver, 1=passenger, 2-5=rear)

create_set_temps.description: Set driver and passenger climate temps (Celsius)

create_set_valet_mode.description: Enable/disable Valet mode with optional PIN

create_share.description: Send navigation destination to the car (address or coordinates)

body.name: value
body.description: Object containing destination text or coords

create_window_control.description: Vent or close all windows; command = vent | close

get_compose_image.description: Compose a rendered image of the configured vehicle

get_data_charge_state.description: Charge state subset (faster than full vehicle_data)

get_mobile_enabled.description: Is mobile control enabled in the car

get_nearby_chargers.description: Nearby Supercharger sites with stall availability subfield

get_release_notes.description: Release notes for the current/queued software update

users.description: Account config, feature flags, orders, and key/credential management

create_keys.description: Add a virtual phone key or BLE key

get_app_config.description: Mobile app feature flags and runtime config

get_orders.description: Tesla orders (new vehicle deliveries, accessory purchases)

vehicles.description: Per-vehicle data, climate, locks, remote start, and Hermes telemetry token

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

get_service_data.description: Open service appointments and recent service history for this vehicle

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

get_vehicle_data.description: Full vehicle state snapshot: charge, climate, drive, GUI, vehicle config, and software

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)
